% Auto-generated file. Do not edit directly.
% Source: config/spacing.yml
\providecommand{\VIUParagraphIndent}{0pt}
\providecommand{\VIUParagraphSkip}{0.8\baselineskip}
\providecommand{\VIUSectionBeforeSkip}{0pt}
\providecommand{\VIUSectionAfterSkip}{0.15cm}
\providecommand{\VIUSubsectionBeforeSkip}{0.5cm}
\providecommand{\VIUSubsectionAfterSkip}{0.0cm}
\providecommand{\VIUSectionTitlePadLen}{0.2cm}
\definecolor{VIULinkInternalColor}{HTML}{79C6EB}
\definecolor{VIULinkFigureColor}{HTML}{79C6EB}
\definecolor{VIULinkTableColor}{HTML}{79C6EB}
\definecolor{VIULinkAnnexColor}{HTML}{79C6EB}
\definecolor{VIULinkBibliographyColor}{HTML}{79C6EB}
\definecolor{VIULinkUrlColor}{HTML}{79C6EB}
\newcommand{\VIUApplyOptionalSpacing}{%
  \titlespacing*{\subsubsection}{0pt}{0.0cm}{-0.5cm}%
}
\newcommand{\VIUApplyLinkColors}{%
  \hypersetup{%
    colorlinks=true,%
    linkcolor=VIULinkInternalColor,%
    citecolor=VIULinkBibliographyColor,%
    urlcolor=VIULinkUrlColor,%
    filecolor=VIULinkUrlColor%
  }%
}
\newcommand{\figref}[1]{\hyperref[#1]{\textcolor{VIULinkFigureColor}{Figura~\ref*{#1}}}}
\newcommand{\tabref}[1]{\hyperref[#1]{\textcolor{VIULinkTableColor}{Tabla~\ref*{#1}}}}
\newcommand{\aneref}[1]{\hyperref[#1]{\textcolor{VIULinkAnnexColor}{Anexo~\ref*{#1}}}}
